title: 'Viterbo, la città in movimento', la sindaca tira le somme
subtitle: Chiara Frontini parlerà di risultati raggiunti e progetti futuri
content: Si tratta di un evento rivolto alla città di Viterbo per fare il punto sui risultati conseguiti dall'amministrazione comunale della sindaca Chiara Frontini, che giunta a metà del suo mandato vuole illustrare alla cittadinanza i progetti futuri. È "Viterbo, la città in movimento", in programma oggi a partire dalle 16 e 30 nell'auditorium di Unindustria. La sindaca Frontini e la sua amministrazione totalmente civica, al giro di boa del mandato possono vantare anche il record di essere riusciti ad accaparrarsi la totalità dei progetti Pnrr destinati al capoluogo, a fronte di oltre 50 cantieri messi a terra per cambiare in positivo il volto della città. E sarà proprio di questo e di molti altri temi di cui si parlerà all'evento di oggi pomeriggio, che sarà anche l'occasione per condividere i progetti in cantiere insieme ai rappresentanti territoriali dei diversi ambiti di appartenenza. Un incontro che ruota attorno a cinque parole chiave, scelte perché indicano la direzione di marcia verso la quale si sta muovendo Viterbo: Dinamica, Competitiva, Consapevole, Sicura, Capitale, dove quest'ultima sottende, ovviamente, la candidatura a Capitale Europea della Cultura 2033. "Il nostro obiettivo è quello di condividere i risultati conseguiti in questi primi due anni e mezzo di lavoro da parte dell'amministrazione comunale e rendere ancora più costante e fitto il dialogo con la città per mettere a sistema le direttrici strategiche di sviluppo, ognuno per la propria parte di competenza" ha spiegato la sindaca.
en_title: 'Viterbo, the city on the move', the mayor pulls the sums
en_content: This is an event aimed at the city of Viterbo to take stock of the results achieved by the municipal administration of the mayor Chiara Frontini, who, in mid-term of his mandate, wants to illustrate to the citizen the future projects. It is "Viterbo, the city in motion", scheduled today from 16 and 30 in the auditorium of Unindustria. The Frontini mayor and his totally civic administration, at the boa lap of the mandate can also boast the record of having succeeded in accaparrarsi the totality of the Pnrr projects destined to the capital, in front of over 50 yards put on the ground to change in positive the face of the city. And it will be precisely this and many other topics that will be discussed at this afternoon's event, which will also be the occasion to share the projects on site together with the territorial representatives of the different areas of belonging. A meeting that revolves around five key words, chosen because they indicate the direction of march towards which Viterbo is moving: Dinamica, Competitiva, Conscious, Sicura, Capital, where the latter underlies, of course, the candidacy of European Capital of Culture 2033. "Our goal is to share the results achieved in these first two and a half years of work by the municipal administration and make the dialogue with the city even more constant and thicker in order to set up the strategic direction of development, each for its part of competence," the mayor explained.
en_subtitle: Chiara Frontini will talk about results achieved and future projects

title: Protocollo Roma-L'Aquila per Giubileo e Capitale Cultura '26
subtitle: Consiglio capitolino voterà martedì proposta di collaborazione
content:
Il Consiglio comunale di Roma
Capitale discuterà e voterà, martedì 11 febbraio, la proposta di
delibera che prevede un protocollo d'intesa con L'Aquila per
rinsaldare e promuovere il profondo legame tra le due città. 
   La proposta, presentata da Dario Nanni, consigliere
capitolino e presidente della Commissione Giubileo, è stata
accolta dal Comune del capoluogo d'Abruzzo. 
   Nell'occasione, il sindaco dell'Aquila, Pierluigi Biondi, e
una delegazione del capoluogo abruzzese, saranno ospiti
nell'aula Giulio Cesare per assistere e intervenire alla
discussione. 
   "Si tratta di un segno concreto di amicizia, dagli effetti
tangibili e immediati, tra due realtà legate per diverse ragioni
- commenta il sindaco dell'Aquila, Pierluigi Biondi - per questo
ringrazio il consigliere Nanni e l'Assise capitolina". 
   "Le due città saranno reciprocamente vicine su progetti
comuni e di valorizzazione reciproca che aumenteranno la
mobilità e i flussi turistici - aggiunge il primo cittadino -
ancora di più in questo anno giubilare e in vista del 2026,
quando L'Aquila sarà Capitale italiana della Cultura".
en_title: Rome-L'Aquila Protocol for Jubilee and Capital Culture '26
en_content:
The City Council of Rome
Capital will discuss and vote, Tuesday 11 February, the proposal
deliberation that previews a protocol of understanding with L'Aquila for
strengthen and promote the deep bond between the two cities.
The proposal, submitted by Dario Nanni, adviser
Chapter and President of the Jubilee Commission, was
welcomed by the Municipality of Abruzzo.
On the occasion, the mayor of the Eagle, Pierluigi Biondi, and
a delegation of the capital of Abruzzo, will be guests
in the room Giulio Cesare to assist and intervene in
debate.
"This is a concrete sign of friendship, from the effects
tangible and immediate, between two realities linked for different reasons
- comments the mayor of the Eagle, Pierluigi Biondi - for this
I thank Councilman Nanni and the Capitoline Axis."
"The two cities will be mutually close on projects
common and mutual enhancement which will increase the
mobility and tourist flows - adds the first citizen -
even more in this jubilee year and in view of 2026,
when L'Aquila will be the Italian Capital of Culture".
en_subtitle: Chapter Council will vote on Tuesday proposal for collaboration

title: Agrigento capitale: il 30 aprile arriva la Amerigo Vespucci
subtitle: Nave approderà a Porto Empedocle
content:
Il prossimo 30 aprile il veliero
Amerigo Vespucci, la nave scuola della marina militare, getterà
l'ancora a Porto Empedocle per omaggiare l'evento Agtigento
capitale Italiana della cultura 2025. "Attendiamo con entusiasmo
l'arrivo della nave, si tratta di un'occasione di orgoglio per
l'intera comunità, a conferma del prestigio di Agrigento e di
tutta la provincia - dice il sindaco di Agrigento, Francesco
Micciché - Ringrazio il ministro della Difesa, Guido Crosetto,
l'ammiraglio Enrico Credendino e il generale Luciano Antonio
Portolano per aver accolto la mia richiesta".
en_title: Agrigento capital: on 30 April arrives Amerigo Vespucci
en_content:
Next 30 April the sailor
Amerigo Vespucci, the Navy school ship, will throw
anchor in Porto Empedocle to honor the Agtigento event
Italian capital of culture 2025. "We look forward with enthusiasm
the arrival of the ship, it is an opportunity of pride for
the entire community, confirming the prestige of Agrigento and
all the province - says the mayor of Agrigento, Francesco
Micciché - I thank the Minister of Defense, Guido Crosetto,
Admiral Enrico Credendino and General Luciano Antonio
Portolano for accepting my request."
en_subtitle: Ship will land in Porto Empedocle

title: Agrigento capitale, tutto pronto per sagra Mandorlo in fiore
subtitle: Si terrà dall'8 al 16 marzo prossimi, anteprima il 21 febbraio
content:
Il 77° Mandorlo in fiore, in
programma ad Agrigento dall'8 al 16 marzo prossimi, è pronto a
tracciare un'impronta significativa in un anno particolare per
la città, quello di Capitale Italiana della Cultura 2025. Lo
staff della kermesse, proprio con l'intento di celebrare il
2025, intende coinvolgere gli agrigentini e i visitatori che
avranno la possibilità di vivere la manifestazione grazie alle
iniziative previste tra strade e piazze, anche con eventi
musicali, culturali ed enogastronomici. Tradizione, storia e
folklore si intrecceranno con cultura e innovazione e animeranno
la città.
en_title: Agrigento capital, all ready for sagra Mandorlo in bloom
en_content:
The 77° Mandorlo in bloom, in
program in Agrigento from 8 to 16 March next, is ready to
trace a significant footprint in a particular year for
the city, that of Italian Capital of Culture 2025. I do.
staff of the kermesse, with the intention to celebrate the
2025, intends to involve the Agrigentini and visitors who
will have the opportunity to live the event thanks to
planned initiatives between roads and squares, even with events
musical, cultural and food and wine. Tradition, history and
folklore will intercede with culture and innovation and will animate
the city.
en_subtitle: It will be held from 8 to 16 March next, preview on 21 February

title: "Sapori delle Marche rurali" progetto sinergico per il turismo
subtitle: Cinque percorsi dedicati a vino, birra, tartufo, miele e olio
content:
Cinque percorsi
enogastronomici che uniscano le Marche rurali dall'Ascolano al
Pesarese, toccando le aree interne di tutte le province della
Regione per valorizzare l'identità territoriale, promuovere i
prodotti delle imprese locali, migliorare la qualità
dell'accoglienza e puntare alla destagionalizzazione turistica.
en_title: "Sapori of rural Marche" synergistic project for tourism
en_content:
Five routes
food and wine that join the rural Marches from Ascolano to
Pesarese, touching the inner areas of all provinces of
Region to value territorial identity, promote the
local business products, improve quality
the reception and point to the tourist seasonalization.

subtitle: Film Blu inaugura omaggio all'autore polacco
content:
Cinema Addiction, il ciclo di
proiezioni a cura di Apulia Film Commission, propone la visione
della Trilogia dei colori del regista polacco Krzysztof
Kieślowski, considerata uno dei punti più alti del cinema
europeo degli Anni '90. Ad inaugurare questo ciclo sarà Film
Blu, in programma giovedì 20 febbraio alle 20.30 (ingresso
libero fino ad esaurimento posti), in contemporanea nei
Cineporti di Bari, Lecce e Taranto (Spazioporto) e Laltrocinema
Cicolella di Foggia (in collaborazione con il Comune di Foggia).

screenings by Apulia Film Commission, proposes vision
by Polish director Krzysztof
Kieślowski, considered one of the highest points in cinema
European of the 1990s. To inaugurate this cycle will be Film

free up to exhaustion places), simultaneously in

Cicolella di Foggia (in collaboration with the Municipality of Foggia).

title: Agrigento Capitale, al via progetto Tra identità e algoritmo
subtitle: Presentato stamane il programma dell'iniziativa scientifica
content:
E' stato presentato stamane,
nell'ambito delle attività del programma di "Agrigento Capitale
Italiana della Cultura 2025", nel foyer "Pippo Montalbano" del
Teatro Pirandello di Agrigento, "Le colonne portanti della
nostra identità e il dominio dell'algoritmo", un progetto
innovativo ideato e promosso dal Liceo Scientifico Leonardo e
dalla Fondazione Agrigento 2025, inserito nel programma
ufficiale di Agrigento Capitale della Cultura 2025. Obiettivo
dell'iniziativa è quello di creare un ponte tra scienza, arte e
cultura, dando vita a un percorso di scoperta e riflessione che,
tramite la programmazione di conferenze, laboratori, spettacoli
e mostre, sia accessibile a tutti. In particolare, il Liceo
Scientifico Leonardo si fa promotore di un'idea di umanesimo
tecnologico, che coniuga il pensiero classico con la
contemporaneità, stimolando la curiosità e la partecipazione
attiva, con un'attenzione speciale alla valorizzazione del ruolo
delle ragazze nelle discipline Stem (scienza, tecnologia,
ingegneria e matematica). L'iniziativa, infatti, si propone di
avvicinare un ampio pubblico alle discipline scientifiche,
stimolando la curiosità e l'interesse verso saperi quali
matematica, biologia, fisica, chimica, astronomia con un occhio
sempre attento ai temi etico-filosofici. Sono in programma, in
un percorso che si articolerà lungo tutto il 2025, un ciclo di
conferenze e tavole rotonde con esperti di nel campo
scientifico-tecnologico. Le iniziative prenderanno il via sabato
22 febbraio e si concluderanno il 4 marzo e si articoleranno in
una vera e propria "Settimana della Cultura scientifica" che
sarà aperta alle scuole secondarie di primo e secondo grado
della città e ai cittadini.
en_title: Agrigento Capitale, on the project path Between identity and algorithm
en_content:
It was presented this morning.
under the activities of the program of "Agrigento Capitale
Italian Culture 2025", in the foyer "Pippo Montalbano" of
Teatro Pirandello di Agrigento, "Le colonne portanti della
our identity and the domain of the algorithm", a project
innovative idea and promoted by Liceo Scientifico Leonardo and
by Fondazione Agrigento 2025, included in the programme
by Agrigento Capital of Culture 2025. Objective
of the initiative is to create a bridge between science, art and
culture, giving life to a path of discovery and reflection that,
through the programming of conferences, workshops, shows
and exhibitions, both accessible to all. In particular, the Lycée
Scientific Leonardo promotes an idea of humanism
technology, which combines classic thinking with
contemporary, stimulating curiosity and participation
active, with special attention to enhancing the role
of girls in Stem disciplines (science, technology,
engineering and mathematics). The initiative, in fact, aims to
bringing a wide audience to scientific disciplines,
stimulating curiosity and interest in knowing which
mathematics, biology, physics, chemistry, astronomy with an eye
always attentive to ethical-philosophical themes. I'm on schedule.
a path that will articulate throughout 2025, a cycle of
conferences and round tables with field experts
scientific-technological. The initiatives will start on Saturday
22 February and will end on 4 March and will enlist in
a real "Settimana della Cultura Scientific" that
will be open to secondary schools of first and second degree
the city and the citizens.
en_subtitle: Presented this morning the programme of the scientific initiative

title: Registro delle ricette regionali, già inserite oltre 110
subtitle: Negli spot i marchigiani che hanno registrato prime sei ricette
content:
Sono già state raccolte oltre 110
ricette provenienti da ogni parte della regione e inserite nel
neonato Registro delle ricette della cucina marchigiana,
istituito con la Legge Regionale n. 06 del 2024. "Grazie a una
piattaforma online dedicata
(https://ricettedellacucinamarchigiana.it/), chiunque può
partecipare inviando le ricette di famiglia. Ogni piatto,
semplice o elaborato, racconta una storia fatta di tradizioni,
legami e sapori unici" ha evidenziato l'assessore regionale al
Commercio, Andrea Maria Antonini, che ha invitato a continuare a
inviare i piatti tipici del territorio. Per meglio pubblicizzare
e diffondere l'iniziativa, sono stati realizzati degli spot
pubblicitari, reel, pagine social ed anche un tutorial per
facilitare l'inserimento delle ricette che andranno a comporre
il Registro. Negli spot ci sono anche i marchigiani che hanno
registrato le prime sei ricette: per lo stoccafisso
all'anconetana, Alessandro Ascoli; per le olive all'ascolana e
gli gnocchi alla Lina, Lina Fioravanti e Pamela Andreani di
Montegallo (Ascoli Piceno); per la cicerchia l'associazione
Festa della cicerchia di Serra de' Conti (Ancona); per il
brodetto alla fanese Simone Serfilippi e Stefano (Teto) Romano
di Fano (Pesaro Urbino); per il Coniglio in Porchetta Ambra
Giorgetti e Adina Rapagnani di Rapagnano (Fermo); per i
vincisgrassi Maria Rita Paolucci di Potenza Picena (Macerata).
en_title: Register of regional recipes, already inserted over 110
en_content:
Over 110 have already been collected
recipes from all parts of the region and inserted in
Register of recipes of the Marche cuisine,
established with Regional Law no. 06 of 2024. "Thanks to a
dedicated online platform
(https://ricettedellacucinamarchigiana.it/), anyone may
participate by sending family recipes. Every dish,
simple or elaborate, tells a story made of traditions,
unique ties and flavors" highlighted the regional Councillor to
Commerce, Andrea Maria Antonini, who has invited to continue
send the typical dishes of the territory. To better advertise
and disseminate the initiative, commercials were made
advertising, reel, social pages and also a tutorial for
facilitate the insertion of recipes that will compose
the register. In the commercials there are also the labels that have
recorded the first six recipes: for stoccafisso
to the anconetana, Alessandro Ascoli; for the olives to the ascolana and
gnocchi alla Lina, Lina Fioravanti and Pamela Andreani
Montegallo (Ascoli Piceno); for the cicerchia the association
Festival of the cicerchia of Serra de' Conti (Ancona);
Simone Serfilippi and Stefano (Teto) Romano
by Fano (Pesaro Urbino); for the Rabbit in Porchetta Ambra
Giorgetti and Adina Rapagnani of Rapagnano (Fermo); for i
winsgrassi Maria Rita Paolucci di Potenza Picena (Macerata).
en_subtitle: In the commercials the Marches that have recorded first six recipes

title: Torna Bif&st, al via l'edizione ponte tra passato e futuro
subtitle: Il 22/3 al Petruzzelli di Bari 'Le assaggiatrici' di Soldini
content:
Una "edizione zero" che non "annulla
il passato ma che si proietta, come un ponte, verso grandi
innovazioni". Oscar Iarussi annuncia così la sedicesima edizione
del Bif&st, il Bari International Film&TV Festival, dal 22 al 29
marzo. La prima in veste di direttore artistico. La Regione, che
da quest'anno è detentrice del marchio e che, come ha detto il
presidente Michele Emiliano "ha istituzionalizzato
definitivamente il Bif&st", ha emanato gli indirizzi generali.
en_title: Bif&st, the bridge between past and future
en_content:
A "zero edition" not "nothing"
the past but projecting itself, like a bridge, towards great
innovations." Oscar Iarussi announces the 16th edition
by Bif&st, the Bari International Film&TV Festival, from 22 to 29
March. The first as artistic director. The Region, which
from this year she is the holder of the brand and, as the
President Michele Emiliano "has institutionalized
definitively the Bif&st", issued the general addresses.
en_subtitle: 22/3 at Petruzzelli di Bari 'Le assaggiatrici' by Soldini

title: Alla Berlinale in concorso film Yunan girato anche in Puglia
subtitle: Sostegno di Apulia Film Commission e Regione
content:
Alla prestigiosa Berlinale, festival
cinematografico che si svolge nella città tedesca dal 13 al 23
febbraio, è in concorso il film Yunan, diretto da Ameer Fakher
Eldin, in parte girato in Puglia. La pellicola sarà proiettata
mercoledì 19 febbraio in anteprima assoluta. 
   Yunan è prodotto da Red Balloon Film (Germania), Microclimat
Films (Quebec), Intramovies (Italia), Fresco Films (Italia),
Metafora Production (Quatar), Tabi360 (Giordania), con il
sostegno di Red Sea Fund (Arabia Esaudita), il contributo del
Ministero della Cultura e quello di Apulia Film Commission e
Regione Puglia a valere su risorse del Por Puglia Fesr-Fse
2014/2020. Alcune scene sono state girate tra Gravina in Puglia,
Minervino Murge, Poggiorsini e Spinazzola.
en_title: At the Berlinale in competition film Yunan also shot in Puglia
en_content:
To the prestigious Berlinale, festival
cinema that takes place in the German city from 13 to 23
February, is in competition the film Yunan, directed by Ameer Fakher
Eldin, partly shot in Puglia. The film will be projected
Wednesday 19 February in the premiere.
Yunan is produced by Red Balloon Film (Germany), Microclimat
Films (Quebec), Intramovies (Italy), Fresco Films (Italy),
Metafora Production (Quatar), Tabi360 (Giordania), with
support of Red Sea Fund (Arabia Esaudita), the contribution of
Ministry of Culture and Apulia Film Commission and
Apulia Region worth on resources of Por Puglia Fesr-Fse
2014/2020. Some scenes were shot between Gravina in Puglia,
Minervino Murge, Poggiorsini and Spinazzola.
en_subtitle: Support of Apulia Film Commission and Region

title: CO.DON GmbH partners in EU-Funded Project to Advance 3D Bioprinting for Tissue Regeneration
content: Teltow, 05. February 2025 – The EU-funded micro2MACRO (m2M) project, launched in December 2024, aims to advance tissue regeneration through an innovative bioprinting platform.     CO.DON develops, produces and distributes autologous cell therapies for the minimally invasive repair of cartilage defects. The product being marketed is a cell therapy product for the minimally invasive treatment of cartilage damage in the knee joint that uses only the patient's own cartilage cells. More than 20,000 patients have already been treated with CO.DON's method. In January 2023, CO.DON GmbH was acquired by ReLive Biotechnologies, a global company headquartered in the US.  Contact
en_title: CO.DON GmbH partners in EU-Funded Project to Advance 3D Bioprinting for Tissue Regeneration

The product being marketed is a cell therapy product for the minimally invasive treatment of cartilage damage in the knee joint that uses only the patient's own cartilage cells. In January 2023, CO.DON GmbH was acquired by ReLive Biotechnologies, a global company headquartered in the US. Contact

title: Cinema d'autore, a Bari rassegna 'Registi fuori dagli schermi'
subtitle: La regista Sara Fgaier in sala presenta "Sulla terra leggeri"
content:
Riprende, con la sezione invernale,
la rassegna di cinema internazionale 'Registi fuori dagli
schermi', che si svolge al multisala Galleria di Bari. La
manifestazione, giunta alla 14esima edizione, è dedicata al
cinema d'autore e contemporaneo. Il prossimo 27 gennaio (ore
20.45) ci sarà in sala la regista, produttrice e montatrice Sara
Fgaier, che accompagnerà il suo film 'Sulla terra leggeri', già
in concorso allo scorso festival di Locarno. Insieme alla
regista interverranno Luigi Abiusi e Cristina Piccino, critico
cinematografico. La rassegna è finanziata da Regione Puglia e
Fondazione Apulia film commission.
en_title: Cinema d'autore, in Bari review 'Regists out of the screens'
en_content:
Resume, with winter section,
the international film festival 'Regists out of the
screens, which takes place at the multi-sala Galleria di Bari. The
event, now at the 14th edition, is dedicated to
cinema of author and contemporary. Next 27 January (hour
20.45) there will be the director, producer and editor Sara
Fgaier, who will accompany his film 'On the light ground', already
in competition at last Locarno festival. Together with
director will intervene Luigi Abiusi and Cristina Piccino, critic
cinematographic. The exhibition is funded by Regione Puglia and
Foundation Apulia film commission.
en_subtitle: Director Sara Fgaier in the room presents "On light ground"

title: Universal Film Academy apre le audizioni per attori e doppiatori di talento!
subtitle: Come prepararsi per un posto nell’accademia di cinema più ambita d’Italia in 10 semplici mosse
content: Se il tuo sogno è entrare nel mondo del cinema o del doppiaggio, Universal Film Academy ti offre l’opportunità di realizzarlo. Con un approccio innovativo e una solida esperienza, l'Accademia, guidata da Alessandro Cardia, rappresenta un punto di riferimento nel settore della formazione per attori e doppiatori. Scegliere di studiare presso Universal Film Academy significa immergersi in un ambiente altamente professionale, in cui ogni allievo viene seguito personalmente da docenti e professionisti, pronti a trasmettere il loro know-how con passione e dedizione. Ecco alcuni consigli utili per affrontare al meglio questa occasione: Puntualità: Arrivare in anticipo dimostra professionalità e rispetto per il tempo altrui. La tua audizione inizia dal momento in cui varchi la porta. Studiare in un’accademia prestigiosa come Universal Film Academy significa avere accesso a una formazione di eccellenza, basata su un metodo vincente e sul contatto diretto con i professionisti del settore. L'Accademia punta a formare artisti completi, pronti ad affrontare le sfide del mondo dello spettacolo con competenza, passione e determinazione.
en_title: Universal Film Academy opens auditions for talented actors and dubbing!
en_content: If your dream is to enter the world of cinema or dubbing, Universal Film Academy offers you the opportunity to realize it. With an innovative approach and a solid experience, the Academy, led by Alessandro Cardia, represents a point of reference in the field of training for actors and dubbing. Choosing to study at Universal Film Academy means immersing yourself in a highly professional environment, where each student is personally followed by teachers and professionals, ready to convey their know-how with passion and dedication. Here are some useful tips to better address this occasion: Punctuality: Coming in advance demonstrates professionalism and respect for the time of others. Your hearing starts from the moment you go through the door. Studying in a prestigious academy like Universal Film Academy means having access to a training of excellence, based on a winning method and direct contact with industry professionals. The Academy aims to form complete artists, ready to face the challenges of the entertainment world with competence, passion and determination.
en_subtitle: How to prepare for a place in the academy of most sought after cinemas in Italy in 10 simple moves

title: ELATEC Strengthens Global Presence with Regional Hub in Dubai
content: Puchheim, January 23, 2025 – ELATEC, a leading global provider of user authentication and identification solutions, is beginning 2025 with a significant step forward in its global expansion strategy: the launch of its new office in Dubai. Operating under the name ELATEC Middle East Trading FZE, this new location will serve as a dedicated hub to support the company’s growing customer base and partners across the Middle East. The operations, led by Managing Director Carsten Hoersch, are set to drive innovative, secure, and tailored access control solutions in the region.      Suited Pictures (Copyright ELATEC): https://pixx.elatec.com/share/1737467969oJ4Vn0qvwbkLcf Press contact ELATEC GmbH:

title: New Year in Chengdu: Feast of Science Fiction, Intangible Cultural Heritage, and Eastern Aesthetics
content: Chengdu, China - In the ancient towns of Chengdu, fish lanterns parade through the streets and fireworks light up the night sky; in the urban center, cutting-edge technology blends the ancient with the modern. From the sci-fi spectacles of today to the enduring charm of intangible cultural heritage and the elegance of Eastern aesthetics, Chengdu pulses with vitality. “Open the Jinmen Gate!” The cry rings out, accompanied by the beat of drums in the Jinmen Scenic Area of Xindu District. The festive atmosphere of the Chinese New Year spills out from the lively street scenes. Nearly 100 banquets of “Nine Bowls”—a traditional and distinctive Sichuan feast—are laid out in a row, with steam rising from the dishes in the cold winter. The rich aroma of meat mingles with the savory, spicy notes of fermented broad bean paste, filling the air. The authentic “Sichuan flavor” is impossible to resist at this banquet, celebrating the Chinese New Year with a tribute to intangible cultural heritage. This marks the first Spring Festival since the Chinese New Year was added to the Representative List of UNESCO’s Intangible Cultural Heritage of Humanity in December of last year. To celebrate this achievement, Chengdu’s cultural inheritors showcase their crafts. On quincuncial piles, lion dancers leap and twirl in celebration of the New Year. At the sugar painting stalls, children watch in wide-eyed wonder as artisans skillfully create dragon and phoenix designs, forming sweet childhood memories. Young women, dressed in traditional hanfu garments with head-pinned flowers and holding fish lanterns, stroll in groups beneath the night sky. Meanwhile, molten iron fireworks shoot into the air—a fiery spectacle exclusive to Chengdu, burning at a searing 1,600 degrees Celsius. At the Wenshufang Street Intangible Cultural Heritage Chinese New Year Goods Shopping Festival, the spirit of the New Year is woven seamlessly into shopping. A dazzling array of specialty goods—from handmade sugar paintings and Shu brocade sachets to cured meat and sausages—lines the streets. Tourists carrying red paper bags, browse and select goods with joy on their faces, radiating the happiness of the holiday season. This street, brimming with New Year’s cheer, reflects not only the inheritance of tradition but also a celebration of everyday life. At the Chengdu Science Fiction Museum, the “Ancient Shu Kingdom Looks at Today’s Pidu: Sci-Fi Chinese New Year” Nebula Magic Night is in full swing. The highlight, the “Golden Snake Fire Dance” drone show, transforms the night sky with a massive spaceship that glows with cool blue and blazing white light, as though it is traveling from the present straight into the future. In addition, the “Sparkling Fire” fire pot performance symbolizes the removal of evil and the blessing of peace, while the “Interstellar Travel” concert, with its passionate performances, leaves the audience wondering whether they are witnessing the present or the future. Culture is the lifeblood of a city. In 2024, Chengdu harnessed culture to drive economic vitality, enrich urban life, benefit its people, and promote cultural exchange. Through a series of cultural events, the city has fostered a spiritual home for its citizens, contributing to the ongoing construction of a world-class cultural city. For the 2025 Spring Festival, Chengdu is celebrating under the theme “Vibrant Chengdu Year, Countless New Beginnings,” launching 12 major tourism and cultural events, along with over 1,000 special activities across 13 categories. The Chinese New Year in Chengdu is not only a fusion of fireworks and blooming flowers but also a dazzling showcase of the city’s cultural vitality.  Picture1: The "Ancient Shu Kingdom Looks at Today's Pidu: Sci-Fi Chinese New Year" Nebula Magic Night is in full swing Source: City of Chengdu

To celebrate this achievement, Chengdu’s cultural inheritors showcase their crafts. On quincuncial fleece, lion dancers leap and twirl in celebration of the New Year. At the sugar painting stalls, children watch in wide-eyed wonder as artisans skillfully created dragon and phoenix designs, forming sweet childhood memories. Young women, dressed in traditional hanfu garments with head-pinned flowers and holding fish lanterns, stroll in groups beneath the night sky. Meanwhile, many iron fireworks shoot into the air—a fiery spectacle exclusive to Chengdu, burning at a searing 1,600 degrees Celsius. At the Wenshufang Street Intangible Cultural Heritage Chinese New Year Goods Shopping Festival, the spirit of the New Year is woven seamlessly into shopping. A dazzling array of specialty goods—from sugar handmade paintings and Shu brocade sachets to cured meat and sausages—lines the streets. Tourists carrying red paper bags, browse and select goods with joy on their faces, radiating the happiness of the holiday season. This street, brimming with New Year’s cheer, reflect not only the inheritance of tradition but also a celebration of everyday life. At the Chengdu Science Fiction Museum, the “Ancient Shu Kingdom Looks at Today’s Pidu: Sci-Fi Chinese New Year” Nebula Magic Night is in full swing. The highlight, the “Golden Snake Fire Dance” drone show, transforms the night sky with a massive spaceship that glows with cool blue and blazing white light, as though it is traveling from the present straight into the future. In addition, the “Sparkling Fire” fire pot performance symbols the removal of evil and the blessing of peace, while the “Interstellar Travel” concert, with its passionate performances, leaves the audience wondering whether they are witnessing the present or the future. Culture is the lifeblood of a city. In 2024, Chengdu harnessed culture to drive economic vitality, enrich urban life, benefit its people, and promote cultural exchange. Through a series of cultural events, the city has fostered a spiritual home for its citizens, contributing to the ongoing construction of a world-class cultural city. For the 2025 Spring Festival, Chengdu is celebrating under the theme “Vibrant Chengdu Year, Countless New Beginnings,” launched 12 major tourism and cultural events, along with over 1,000 special activities across 13 categories. The Chinese New Year in Chengdu is not only a fusion of fireworks and blooming flowers but also a dazzling showcase of the city’s cultural vitality. Picture1: The "Ancient Shu Kingdom Looks at Today's Pidu: Sci-Fi Chinese New Year" Nebula Magic Night is in full swing Source: City of Chengdu

title: Germany "rested on its laurels" too long, report finds
content: Los Angeles/DNA – High levels of governance have masked a slow decline in Germany, with political, economic, and social fractures "festering over years", a new scientific report released only weeks ahead of the February 23 parliamentary elections concludes. "It has become clear that Germany rested on its laurels for far too long", the BGI Germany Report on the country’s governance performance says. It is based on the Berggruen Governance Index (BGI) and was conducted by researchers from the Los Angeles-based Berggruen Institute think tank, the Luskin School of Public Affairs at the University of California Los Angeles (UCLA), and the Hertie School, a German university. In their report "Germany 2025 - Slow decline in governance performance erupts into crisis of government as geopolitics worsen" the researchers conclude that the country’s government and administrative systems have appeared increasingly sclerotic and hesitant to adopt necessary changes. Effective, often painful reforms are urgently needed, but political and economic constraints make them difficult to implement, the researchers write. The 2024 BGI measures democratic accountability, delivery of public goods and state capacity on a scale from 0 to 100. It analyses the years from 2000 to 2021. According to the report, Germany has lost ground on all three measures, with structural problems festering since the "deceptively benign" years of the chancellorship of Angela Merkel (2005-2021). The Democracy Accountability Index score, for example, slid to 93 in 2021 from a near perfect 99 at the beginning of the century. The data "suggests that some of Germany’s state capacity and democratic accountability challenges were masked by economic growth, driven by the success of its export-oriented model during the 2010s", the report says. Chief among Germany’s challenges are economic troubles that have worsened in recent years, largely stemming from a lack of public investment during that period in areas such as digitalization and transport infrastructure. On February 23, Germans go to the polls early after the ruling three-party coalition consisting of the Social Democrats (SPD), the Greens and the liberal Free Democrats (FDP) collapsed in November. Intra-government fighting over how to get the country’s ailing economy back on track was a main factor of the break-up. At the same time, social trust is declining in Europe’s largest economy. However, a possible new government under the conservative CDU/CSU alliance and its candidate for the chancellorship, Friedrich Merz, seems poised to exacerbate divisions rather than resolving them, the researchers say. The economic difficulties heighten uncertainty and discontent, the report argues – with migration emerging as the other major flashpoint. Rhetoric on economic scarcity is used to highlight tensions over migration, which are exploited by both the extreme right and left. That debate has been exacerbated by a recent deadly stabbing in which a migrant facing deportation from Germany is the main suspect. Yet immigration is essential to Germany’s future growth, the BGI report says: "Any future government will have to attempt to reconcile anti-immigrant attitudes with the social reality of integration and the economic necessity of attracting foreign-born workers." Merz is promising a hard line on migration in case of an election victory. Despite provoking outrage from other political parties, Merz on Wednesday (January 29) pushed through a vote in parliament on proposals for tightening immigration controls. "Current asylum and immigration policy jeopardizes the security of the people and the confidence of all of society in the state," the text of the motion by the CDU/CSU says. The passed proposal includes a request to the German government to turn back asylum seekers at Germany's borders. But even more incendiary in German politics has been Merz's willingness to break long-standing taboos and use votes from the far-right Alternative for Germany (AfD) in order to pass the motion. All long-established parties in the lower house of the German parliament, the Bundestag, had previously said they would not work with the AfD, with many Germans alarmed at the rise of the party in recent years in a country still scarred by its Nazi past. ---------------------------------------------- This text and the accompanying material (photos and graphics) are an offer from the Democracy News Alliance, a close co-operation between Agence France-Presse (AFP, France), Agenzia Nazionale Stampa Associata (ANSA, Italy), The Canadian Press (CP, Canada), Deutsche Presse-Agentur (dpa, Germany) and PA Media (PA, UK). title: HEIDELBERG sees clear increase in profitability in third quarter of financial year 2024/2025
content: “We have succeeded in continuously improving our sales and operating result quarter by quarter in a difficult economic environment. Thanks to our high order backlog, we can confirm that we will achieve our targets for the year" said Jürgen Otto, CEO of HEIDELBERG. “And we will drive down costs further still in the coming year by implementing our plan for the future and boosting efficiency. This cost discipline will have a positive effect on our profitability, which should improve further in the next financial year." Based on strong order levels, the company anticipates a clear increase in sales in the fourth quarter of the current financial year in particular. The         Image material and further information about the company are available in the  More:

title: RSD TAKES OFF IN NORTH MACEDONIA
content: Towcester - This year, approximately 35,000 guests from the RSD Group, to which RSD Travel Ltd. also belongs, will visit North Macedonia. This beautiful holiday destination thus becomes a valuable component in the RSD travel assortment. To underline the importance of this cooperation, North Macedonia’s Prime Minister Hristijan Mickoski recently received the owner of Funk-Holding, Christian Funk.   Phone: +44 20 3514 35 43

title: Experian: boom del Buy Now Pay Later a gennaio con +27,5%, moda e under-30 trainano la domanda
subtitle: •	Il BNPL si conferma una soluzione di pagamento in costante crescita con il +30% nel 2024 rispetto al 2023. Un trend che segue la forte espansione degli anni precedenti (+100% nel 2023 e +206% nel 2022).
content: Il Buy Now, Pay Later si afferma ormai stabilmente come soluzione di pagamento apprezzata da consumatori italiani. Lo conferma l'ultimo Rapporto sul Credito di Experian, data tech company, secondo cui a gennaio 2025 il BNPL è cresciuto del 27,5% rispetto allo stesso mese del 2024. Nel complesso, il 2024 ha sancito come il BNPL sia ormai una forma di finanziamento irrinunciabile, con una crescita del +30% rispetto al 2023 dopo 3 anni di forte espansione anno su anno: nel 2023, il BNPL è cresciuto del +99,98% e nel 2022 è cresciuto del +206% rispetto al 2021. Gli acquisti tramite BNPL si concentrano sui prodotti di abbigliamento: l’industria della moda copre l’80,9% degli utilizzi di BNPL, ma negli ultimi tre mesi è cresciuta anche la popolarità degli acquisti di articoli per attività outdoor (7,5%). Seguono tra le motivazioni l’acquisto di articoli sportivi (3,57%) e l’utilizzo per spese di estetica (2,31%) o gioielli (2,15%). L'importo medio nazionale delle richieste BNPL è di 149 euro. “Il BNPL non è una moda passeggera, ma rappresenta ormai una forma di finanziamento in costante espansione nel mondo dei pagamenti digitali; la crescita del +30% anno su anno registrata nel 2024 conferma la solidità di questo trend” commenta   Il segmento dei Millennial (dall’età compresa tra 30 e 45 anni), pur rappresentando la quota maggiore di richieste (39%), mostra una crescita annua più contenuta (+22,4%) e un calo mensile più marcato (-8,3%), suggerendo una possibile saturazione del mercato in questa fascia d'età.
en_title: Experian: Buy Now Pay Later boom in January with +27.5%, fashion and under-30 towing demand
en_content: The Buy Now, Pay Later is now firmly established as a payment solution appreciated by Italian consumers. This confirms the latest Experian Credit Report, data tech company, according to which in January 2025 BNPL grew by 27.5% compared to the same month of 2024. Overall, 2024 has stated that BNPL is now an irrelevant form of financing, with an increase of +30% compared to 2023 after 3 years of strong year-on-year expansion: in 2023, BNPL grew by +99.98% and in 2022 grew by +206% compared to 2021. Purchases through BNPL focus on clothing products: the fashion industry covers 80.9% of BNPL’s usages, but in the last three months the popularity of outdoor articles (7.5%) has also grown. Among the reasons are the purchase of sports items (3,57%) and the use for cosmetic expenses (2,31%) or jewelry (2,15%). The average national amount of BNPL requests is EUR 149. “The BNPL is not a light fashion, but it is now a form of constantly expanding financing in the world of digital payments; the increase of +30% year on year recorded in 2024 confirms the solidity of this trend" comments The segment of the Millennials (from the age between 30 and 45 years), while representing the greater share of demands (39%), shows a more contained annual growth (+22.4%) and a more marked monthly decrease (-8.3%), suggesting a possible saturation of the market in this age group.
en_subtitle: • The BNPL confirms a growing payment solution with 30% in 2024 compared to 2023. A trend that follows the strong expansion of the previous years (+100% in 2023 and +206% in 2022).

title: European Defence Union for strength, peace and freedom
content: The declaration outlines concrete steps to enhance Europe's security architecture, technological leadership, and strategic autonomy in an increasingly volatile and protectionist global environment.   The Europe Panel is hosted by the European Forum Alpbach (President: Othmar Karas; Vice-President: Antonella Mei-Pochtler), The Bavarian Family Entrepreneur Association, The Joint European Disruptive Initiative (JEDI) acting as an advanced research projects agency (ARPA) for Europe (Chairman: André Loesekrug-Pietri), and is an official side event at the premises (Hotel Bayerischer Hof) of the Munich Security Conference 2025. www.munichdeclaration.org

title: Che impatto ha la GenAI sulla prevenzione delle frodi – il report Experian Insight
subtitle: Il 73% dei responsabili della gestione delle frodi concorda sul fatto che l'intelligenza artificiale generativa (GenAI) abbia alterato in modo permanente il panorama delle frodi. Il 58% delle imprese italiane ha registrato un aumento delle perdite dovute a frodi negli ultimi 12 mesi.
content: Experian, leader nel settore dei dati e della tecnologia, ha reso pubblico il suo ultimo report, condotto da Forrester Consulting, che illustra in modo dettagliato come l'Intelligenza Artificiale Generativa (GenAI) stia trasformando il panorama delle frodi. L’indagine, condotta tra 499 figure decisionali esperte nella lotta alle frodi, rivela un aumento delle perdite delle imprese attribuite ad azioni fraudolente, prima fra tutte il furto di identità, e sottolinea l'importanza di adottare solide misure di sicurezza basate su machine learning (ML). La ricerca ha coinvolto otto paesi: Sudafrica, India, Norvegia, Danimarca, Spagna, Italia, Paesi Bassi e Germania.  Il report identifica innanzitutto un’evoluzione significativa: il passaggio da azioni condotte da singoli truffatori a organizzazioni criminali ben strutturate e organizzate, una tendenza aggravata dall'avvento della GenAI. Quasi tre quarti (73%) degli intervistati in Italia e nel mondo concordano sul fatto che la GenAI abbia alterato in modo permanente il panorama delle frodi, rendendolo più complesso e sofisticato. La GenAI ha anche consentito "l'industrializzazione delle frodi", ossia ha fornito ai truffatori gli strumenti per creare e implementare facilmente e su scala tattiche fraudolente come identità sintetiche e deepfake. Inoltre, il 56% delle aziende fatica a identificare l'uso della GenAI in un attacco fraudolento e a quantificarne l'impatto sulle perdite, una percentuale che sale al 69% in Italia. Le aziende devono quindi adottare un approccio ancor più proattivo alla prevenzione delle frodi attraverso l’utilizzo di soluzioni avanzate basate sull'AI e l'integrazione di diversi strumenti specifici gestiti tramite piattaforme di orchestrazione, al fine di valutare con maggiore precisione i rischi di frode, migliorare l'accuratezza del rilevamento e ridurre i costi.  La crescente complessità delle minacce di frode rende ancora più cruciale la collaborazione con partner esterni e l’implementazione di tecnologie avanzate. Quasi quattro responsabili decisionali su cinque lo riconoscono, con il 78% che concorda sul fatto che la collaborazione con partner esterni sia fondamentale per una prevenzione efficace delle frodi (il 73% in Italia). Inoltre, il 63% delle aziende globali concorda sul fatto che la condivisione di dati e informazioni sulle frodi all’interno di un consorzio di organizzazioni sia un modo efficace per identificare le tendenze emergenti, con il 64% che ha registrato un ritorno positivo sugli investimenti (ROI) dalla propria partecipazione. Ciò sottolinea l'importanza di superare le sfide legate alla condivisione dei dati per migliorare gli sforzi di rilevamento e prevenzione delle frodi. Si tratta di una posizione condivisa anche dalle imprese italiane con il 64% che ritiene efficace il ruolo dei consorzi e il 60% che ne ha tratto un ritorno positivo sugli investimenti. Tuttavia, la mancanza di standard condivisi sulla governance e sicurezza dei dati all’interno dei consorzi (58%) e i requisiti posti dalle normative nazionali (58%) sembrano porre un freno per sbloccare il pieno potenziale di queste reti. Per il 61% delle imprese italiane, è essenziale che i consorzi migliorino la propria abilità di condividere dati in maniera sicura e efficiente, anche tra settori industriali diversi.  Date le crescenti minacce di frode e il ruolo critico del machine learning nella fase di prevenzione, l'introduzione di modelli basati su ML è stata riconosciuta come una priorità assoluta dai responsabili aziendali intervistati. Oltre la metà delle aziende ammette di avere difficoltà nell'implementazione di strumenti di ML a causa di dati di addestramento insufficienti (53% nel mondo, 55% in Italia) e mancanza di dati di qualità (54% nel mondo, 55% in Italia). Sviluppare modelli ML efficaci all’interno di ciascuna organizzazione richiede molte più risorse rispetto all'utilizzo di modelli pre-addestrati e verificati. Utilizzando modelli ML standard personalizzabili, le aziende possono accelerare l'implementazione e ottenere valore più velocemente. "In Italia, l’impatto delle frodi sui settori finanziario e delle telecomunicazioni è particolarmente evidente, con il 58% delle aziende locali intervistate che hanno subito perdite dovute alle frodi negli ultimi 12 mesi e il 71% che ha sottolineato una generale crescita dei tentativi di frode,” ha commentato  Per consultare il report completo e conoscere i servizi di Experian per la prevenzione delle frodi:
en_title: What impact GenAI has on fraud prevention – Experian Insight report
en_content: Experian, leader in data and technology, published his latest report, led by Forrester Consulting, which illustrates in detail how Generative Artificial Intelligence (GenAI) is transforming the panorama of fraud. The investigation, conducted between 499 decision-makers in the fight against fraud, reveals an increase in business losses attributed to fraudulent actions, first of all identity theft, and emphasizes the importance of adopting solid safety measures based on machine learning (ML). The research involved eight countries: South Africa, India, Norway, Denmark, Spain, Italy, the Netherlands and Germany. The report first identifies a significant evolution: the passage from actions conducted by individual scammers to well structured and organized criminal organizations, a tendency aggravated by the advent of the GenAI. Almost three quarters (73%) of respondents in Italy and the world agree that GenAI has permanently altered the fraud landscape, making it more complex and sophisticated. GenAI has also allowed "industrialization of fraud", i.e. it provided scammers with tools to easily and easily create and implement fraudulent tactics such as synthetic and deepfake identity. Moreover, 56% of companies are struggling to identify the use of GenAI in a fraudulent attack and to quantify its impact on losses, a percentage rising to 69% in Italy. Companies must therefore take an even more proactive approach to fraud prevention through the use of advanced AI-based solutions and the integration of several specific tools managed through orchestration platforms, in order to better assess fraud risks, improve detection accuracy and reduce costs. The growing complexity of fraud threats makes collaboration with external partners even more crucial and the implementation of advanced technologies. Almost four decision-makers on five recognize it, with 78% agreeing that collaboration with external partners is essential for effective fraud prevention (73% in Italy). In addition, 63% of global companies agree that sharing data and information on fraud within a group of organisations is an effective way to identify emerging trends, with 64% registered a positive return on investments (ROI) from their participation. This emphasises the importance of overcoming data sharing challenges to improve fraud detection and prevention efforts. It is also a position shared by Italian companies with 64% that believes effective the role of consortia and 60% that has taken a positive return on investments. However, the lack of shared standards on governance and data security within consortia (58%) and the requirements set by national regulations (58%) seem to put a stop to unlock the full potential of these networks. For 61% of Italian companies, it is essential that consortia improve their ability to share data safely and efficiently, even among different industries. Given the increasing threats of fraud and the critical role of machine learning in the prevention phase, the introduction of ML-based models has been recognised as an absolute priority by respondents. Over half of companies admit to having difficulty in implementing ML tools due to inadequate training data (53% worldwide, 55% in Italy) and lack of quality data (54% worldwide, 55% in Italy). Developing effective ML models within each organization requires much more resources than using pre-trained and verified models. Using customizable standard ML models, companies can accelerate implementation and get value faster. "In Italy, the impact of fraud on the financial and telecommunications sectors is particularly evident, with 58% of local companies interviewed that have suffered losses due to fraud over the past 12 months and 71% that has underlined a general increase in fraud attempts," commented To consult the full report and get to know the services of Experian for fraud prevention:
en_subtitle: 73% of fraud managers agree that artificial intelligence (GenAI) has permanently altered the fraud scene. 58% of Italian companies recorded an increase in fraud losses over the past 12 months.

title: IL DIAMANTE SAS - La scalata milionaria di una piccola impresa italiana di pulizia
subtitle: Gilberto Vespignani, CEO & Co-Founder, racconta il segreto del successo della sua impresa famigliare: la Leone Master School.
content: Da un fallimento che sembrava irreversibile, a un'impresa in forte crescita con una visione a lungo termine. La storia di La vera svolta arriva, però, solo quando decide di rimettersi in gioco. Questa crescita non è avvenuta per caso. L'approccio di Vespignani è stato metodico: studio, formazione continua e, soprattutto, un cambiamento radicale nella gestione aziendale.
en_title: THE DIAMANTE SAS - The millionaire scale of a small Italian cleaning company
en_content: From a failure that seemed irreversible, to a firm growing with a long-term vision. The story of The True Turn comes, however, only when he decides to get back into play. This growth did not happen by chance. Vespignani's approach was methodical: study, continuing training and, above all, a radical change in business management.
en_subtitle: Gilberto Vespignani, CEO & Co-Founder, tells the secret of the success of his family business: the Leone Master School.

title: Mercato del credito: cresce la fiducia. Prestiti personali a +20% e finalizzati a +8%
subtitle: Il Rapporto sui Prestiti di Segugio.it & Experian per l'ultimo trimestre del 2024 analizza l'andamento delle richieste di prestiti personali, finalizzati e cessioni del quinto evidenziando le diverse tendenze nel Nord, Centro e Sud Italia
content: Il mercato del credito al consumo in Italia chiude il 2024 con una Le Anche i “Il mercato del credito al consumo si rivela fortemente dinamico, con una crescita significativa delle richieste di prestiti personali e finalizzati nell'ultimo trimestre del 2024. L'aumento degli importi medi richiesti, anche in un contesto di tassi ancora elevati, testimonia la fiducia crescente dei consumatori italiani, grazie all'impatto delle misure adottate dalla BCE. Questo scenario positivo richiede un'attenta analisi delle tendenze in atto, per comprendere le esigenze specifiche dei consumatori nelle diverse aree geografiche e fasce d'età.”, commenta
en_title: Credit market: trust grows. Personal loans at +20% and aimed at +8%
en_content: The consumer credit market in Italy closes 2024 with a "The consumer credit market is strongly dynamic, with a significant increase in demand for personal loans and finalized in the last quarter of 2024. The increase in the average amounts required, even in a context of still high rates, bears witness to the increasing trust of Italian consumers, thanks to the impact of the measures taken by the ECB. This positive scenario requires careful analysis of current trends, to understand the specific needs of consumers in different geographical areas and age groups.
en_subtitle: The Report on the loans of Segugio.it & Experian for the last quarter of 2024 analyzes the trend of the requests for personal loans, finalized and disposals of the fifth highlighting the different trends in the North, Centre and South Italy

title: German WPC specialist Naturinform engages experienced export director and manager
content: Redwitz a.d. Rodach  "Our sustainable wood composite material profiles have become increasingly popular around the globe. The great interest international visitors showed to our products at the world's leading trade fair BAU in January confirms that our opportunities in the global market are substantial. With Edward Robinson, we won over a proven expert who will support us in our efforts to further expand our export activities", says Horst Walther, Managing Partner of Naturinform. In addition to that, Yves Houbrechts joined Edward Robinson's team as the Sales Manager for the Netherlands and Belgium region. Houbrechts also has profound experience in the composite materials market and will make significant contributions to strengthen Naturinform's presence in these markets. According to Horst Walther, this internationalisation is a key strategy for future growth of the enterprise: "By integrating UPM products and expanding our own product series for co-extruded decking boards, we are laying the groundwork for permanently consolidating our position in the international market and opening up new business opportunities." Managing Director Pia Hobeck underlines the importance of innovation, product diversity and sustainability for their corporate strategy: "As a leading provider of WPC solutions with environment-friendly and versatile products, we will remain true to our strategy of inspiring even foreign markets and thus successfully growing in the long run." www.naturinform.com Presscontact:

title: Apotex licenses exclusive Canadian rights to Qutenza® from Grünenthal
content: Under the agreement, Searchlight Pharma (“Searchlight”), Apotex's Specialty Pharma Division, will pursue marketing authorization for Qutenza® and market and distribute Qutenza® in Canada upon regulatory approval. Grünenthal will receive an upfront payment in addition to regulatory milestone payments and royalties.  “We have continuously developed Qutenza® to expand its footprint and reach more patients in need – most notably through a relaunch and label extension in the US,” says Jan Adams, Chief Commercial Officer (CCO) at Grünenthal. “Apotex's exceptional commercial capabilities make them the ideal partner for us to tap into the Canadian market, one of the largest pharmaceutical markets in the world. We look forward to serving Canadian patients with this non-systemic, non-opioid treatment option and moving closer to our vision of a world free of pain.” This agreement further reinforces Apotex's dedication to meeting the needs of patients with innovative solutions and expands Apotex's global portfolio of more than 550 pharmaceutical and consumer health products. “Licensing the Canadian rights to Qutenza® enables us to improve the lives of Canadians by increasing the options for advanced pain management, specifically by bringing to Canada a differentiated and novel agent for the treatment of neuropathic pain that is already commercialized in the EU and US markets,” said Mark Nawacki, President of Searchlight. “This agreement demonstrates our continued momentum along our Journey of Health growth strategy and our dedication to enhancing patient care.”   Qutenza® (capsaicin) 8% topical system is approved in the US for the treatment of neuropathic pain associated with postherpetic neuralgia and for the treatment of neuropathic pain associated with diabetic peripheral neuropathy (DPN) of the feet in adults. Important US safety information is available at   Grünenthal is headquartered in Aachen, Germany, and has affiliates in 27 countries across Europe, Latin America, and the US Our products are available in approx. 100 countries. In 2023, Grünenthal employed around 4,400 people and achieved revenues of €1.8 billion.    Searchlight Pharma, the specialty pharma division of Apotex, executes best-in-class search, acquisition, and focused development of innovative and unique specialty healthcare products, with a core of its promoted products focused on women's health, dermatology, allergy, pain management and hospital specialty markets. Learn more about us at  Apotex

title: Juniper Networks Expands AI-Native Routing Portfolio with AI-Native Automation and Extended Coverage to the Edge
content: The ongoing rapid increase in network traffic across both service provider and enterprise WANs, and the rise of new, unpredictable traffic patterns—such as Generative AI (GenAI) workloads—is intensifying the need for reliable, high-performance WAN connectivity and driving up operational complexity. Juniper’s expanded AI-Native Routing portfolio addresses this challenge with advanced automation that scales to the largest enterprises, cloud and service provider networks.    - Grant Lenahan, Partner & Principal Analyst, Appledore Research “Technical leaders of enterprise, cloud and service provider organizations alike face multi-faceted challenges to deliver the best possible business results from the WAN in the AI era. Reliability, performance and empowered users must be balanced against CapEx/OpEx and capacity pressures, operational complexity and sustainability goals. In response, Juniper is delivering the industry’s first converged, comprehensive AI-Native routing solution, taking another step toward the fully Self-Driving Network™. By leveraging a combination of innovation and advanced automation, we’re helping customers to quickly lower WAN running costs, enable out-of-the-box simplicity, achieve significant energy efficiency and drive exceptional experiences at scale.” - AE Natarajan, Executive Vice President & Chief Development Officer, Juniper Networks     Juniper Networks, the Juniper Networks logo, Juniper, Junos, and other trademarks listed

Juniper’s expanded AI-Native Routing portfolio addresses this challenge with advanced automation that scales to the largest enterprises, cloud and service provider networks. - Grant Lenahan, Partner & Principal Analyst, Appledore Research “Technical leaders of enterprise, cloud and service provider alike face multi-faceted challenges to deliver the best possible business results from the WAN in the AI era. title: euNetworks annuncia la nomina di Richard Gulson a Chief Revenue Officer
content: euNetworks Group Limited ("euNetworks"), un'azienda europea di infrastrutture a banda larga essenziali, è lieta di annunciare la nomina di Questo comunicato stampa include contenuti multimediali. Visualizzare l’intero comunicato qui: Richard Gulson, CRO of euNetworks (Photo: Business Wire) Richard fa il suo ingresso in euNetworks dopo oltre 30 anni trascorsi nel settore dei data center e delle telecomunicazioni. Di recente, Richard ha ricoperto posizioni di leadership nelle vendite presso Equinix, un fornitore globale di servizi di data center. Prima degli 11 anni presso Equinix, Richard ha lavorato per oltre 14 anni presso Level 3 Communications (ora Lumen) in ruoli di responsabile delle vendite, sia in Nord America che in Europa. Il testo originale del presente annuncio, redatto nella lingua di partenza, è la versione ufficiale che fa fede. Le traduzioni sono offerte unicamente per comodità del lettore e devono rinviare al testo in lingua originale, che è l'unico giuridicamente valido.
en_title: euNetworks announces Richard Gulson's appointment to Chief Revenue Officer
en_content: euNetworks Group Limited ("euNetworks"), a European company of essential broadband infrastructure, is pleased to announce the appointment of this press release includes multimedia content. View the entire communiqué here: Richard Gulson, CRO of euNetworks (Photo: Business Wire) Richard enters euNetworks after more than 30 years in data center and telecommunications. Recently, Richard held leadership positions in sales at Equinix, a global provider of data center services. Prior to 11 years at Equinix, Richard worked for over 14 years at Level 3 Communications (now Lumen) in sales manager roles, both in North America and Europe. title: ZCG Extends Successful Partnership with Scuderia Ferrari HP Through 2026 Season
content: Z Capital Group (“ZCG”) today announced it has signed an extension to continue as a Team Partner with Scuderia Ferrari HP through the 2026 Formula 1 season. This press release features multimedia. View the full release here: Since the collaboration began in 2023, ZCG has driven innovative initiatives that engage Scuderia Ferrari HP (and Formula 1’s global) fan base in new and creative ways, and support each brand’s goals. As Formula 1 celebrates its 75th anniversary in 2025, the excitement reached new heights with F1 Adding to the excitement, seven-time world champion Lewis Hamilton has joined Charles Leclerc as official driver of Scuderia Ferrari HP, solidifying the team’s pursuit of excellence in this milestone year. “We are thrilled to extend our partnership with Scuderia Ferrari HP and continue to build upon a multi-season relationship that exemplifies our commitment to growth, excellence, and innovation,” said James Zenni, Founder, President, and Chief Executive Officer of ZCG. “With the addition of Lewis Hamilton, Ferrari continues to redefine leadership in the sport. We look forward to supporting this next chapter and further elevating the Formula 1 experience for fans globally.” “We are delighted to extend our partnership with ZCG, whose commitment to innovation and excellence aligns perfectly with our values at Scuderia Ferrari HP,” said Lorenzo Giorgetti, Chief Racing Revenue Officer of Scuderia Ferrari HP. “We greatly value the strong relationship we have built together. As we celebrate this milestone year, we look forward to continuing this successful collaboration into 2025 and beyond.” ZCG continues to see opportunities for growth in Formula 1, which had record race attendance and the second-most U.S. television viewership in 2024. By extending its partnership with Scuderia Ferrari HP, the most successful team in the history of the sport, ZCG is committed to supporting the sport’s continued popularity with fans across the globe.  ZCG’s investors are some of the largest and most sophisticated global institutional investors including pension funds, endowments, foundations, sovereign wealth funds, central banks, and insurance companies. For almost 30 years, ZCG Principals have invested tens of billions of dollars of capital. ZCG has a global team comprised of approximately 400 professionals. The company is headquartered in New York, with affiliate offices located in Pune and Mumbai, India, and Riyadh, KSA. For more information on ZCG, please visit   Tim Ragones / Kate Thompson / Madeline Jones

title: Il Segretario generale del Turismo delle Nazioni Unite, Zurab Pololikashvili, mira a fare di Madrid un simbolo di turismo internazionale con una nuova sede
content: La presentazione di una nuova sede del Turismo delle Nazioni Unite (già UNWTO) è prevista durante le prossime elezioni per l'incarico di Segretario Generale, che si terranno in maggio a Madrid, la capitale che ospita l'agenzia ONU. Questo comunicato stampa include contenuti multimediali. Visualizzare l’intero comunicato qui: UN Tourism Secretary-General, Zurab Pololikashvili (Photo: Business Wire) Cinque candidati sono in corsa per guidare l'organizzazione, che per avere successo richiede il supporto di 18 dei 35 Paesi votanti. L'attuale direttore Zurab Pololikashvili si trova a contendere con forti candidati, tra cui l'ex Ministro greco per il turismo, Harry Theoharis, e l'ex Segretario messicano per turismo, Gloria Guevara, che ha raccolto il sostegno pubblico dai rappresentanti di importanti catene alberghiere internazionali, come Hilton e Hyatt. Il testo originale del presente annuncio, redatto nella lingua di partenza, è la versione ufficiale che fa fede. Le traduzioni sono offerte unicamente per comodità del lettore e devono rinviare al testo in lingua originale, che è l'unico giuridicamente valido.
en_title: The Secretary General of the United Nations Tourism, Zurab Pololikashvili, aims to make Madrid a symbol of international tourism with a new headquarters
en_content: The presentation of a new United Nations Tourism Office (formerly UNWTO) is scheduled for the next elections for the office of Secretary-General, which will be held in May in Madrid, the capital hosting the UN agency. This press release includes multimedia content. View the entire release here: A Tourism Secretary-General, Zurab Pololikashvili (Photo: Business Wire) Five candidates are running to lead the organization, which in order to succeed requires the support of 18 of 35 voting countries. The current director Zurab Pololikashvili is competing with strong candidates, including former Greek Minister for Tourism, Harry Theoharis, and former Mexican Secretary for Tourism, Gloria Guevara, who raised public support from representatives of important international hotel chains such as Hilton and Hyatt. The original text of this announcement, written in the language of departure, is the official version that makes faith. The translations are offered only for convenience of the reader and must refer to the text in the original language, which is the only legally valid.

title: Nel 2030 un maxi-studentato agli ex Mercati Generali Ostiense
subtitle: Torna 'Città dei Giovani', 4 ettari piazze, servizi e parcheggi
content:
La cosiddetta 'Città dei Giovani'
sull'area da tempo abbandonata degli ex Mercati Generali di via
Ostiense ora ha una data di realizzazione: sarà pronta nel 2030
e vedrà realizzare non più un centro commerciale ma un grande
studentato, e poi servizi culturali, spazi pubblici, verde e
grandi piazze, oltre a 50 mila mq di parcheggi, tra superficiali
e interrati. Lo ha annunciato l'assessora ai Lavori Pubblici di
Roma Capitale Ornella Segnalini in audizione in commissione
Trasparenza. Riproduzione riservata © Copyright ANSA
en_title: In 2030 a maxi-student to former General Markets Ostiense
en_content:
The so-called 'City of Youth'
on the abandoned area of the former General Markets
Ostiense now has a date of realization: it will be ready in 2030
and will see to realize no more a mall but a great
student, and then cultural services, public spaces, green and
large squares, in addition to 50 thousand square meters of parking, between superficial
and buried. It has announced the Councillor for Public Works of
Rome Capital Ornella Segnalini audition in commission
Transparency. Reproduction reserved © Copyright ANSA
en_subtitle: Back 'Città dei Giovani', 4 hectares squares, services and parking

title: Reinhard Mohn Prize awarded to  Maia Sandu and Michael Otto
content: “In a crisis-torn world, democracy faces enormous challenges,” said Liz Mohn. “Maintaining, developing and strengthening democracy was one of the key concerns my husband and I had when we established the Bertelsmann Stiftung. That is why we want to send a strong signal on its behalf by awarding the Reinhard Mohn Prize to Maia Sandu and Michael Otto.”   Maia Sandu: “Democracy thrives when people stand up for it, even in the face of adversity. In Moldova, we have chosen the path of democracy, freedom, and European integration, despite immense challenges and external pressures. The recent elections and referendum showed the resilience of our people and their unwavering commitment to a future in the European family. This award is not just for me—it belongs to the people of Moldova, who have chosen democracy over fear, truth over disinformation, and progress over stagnation.” Michael Otto: “Democracy thrives on diversity, just as democracy alone can create diversity: diversity of opinions, of voices and of solutions and the possibilities for realizing them. It is the only way to obtain the best solutions for the future. That is why we must all do our utmost to preserve and strengthen liberal democracy.”  Maia Sandu has been president of the Republic of Moldova since the end of 2020. She was elected to a second term of office at the beginning of November. During the election campaign and voting process, massive attempts by Russia to prevent her re-election through manipulation, interference and the spread of disinformation were documented. Sandu has actively promoted Moldova’s EU integration for years. Michael Otto was chairman of the Executive Board of the Otto Group from 1981 to 2007 and has served as chairman of its Supervisory Board since then. The Hamburg-based entrepreneur was an early advocate of environmental protection, development aid and social and educational projects. He has established several foundations, including the environmental foundation bearing his name as well as Stiftung KlimaWirtschaft and the Michael Otto Foundation for Sustainability.  Jochen Arntz, Telephone: +49 52 41 81 81 129

title: Generali rileva lo storico palazzo Carciotti di Trieste
subtitle: Oggi cerimonia in Municipio. Costo 13,2 milioni di euro
content:
Da oggi lo storico palazzo
Carciotti di Trieste è di proprietà di Generali. Il passaggio
dell'immobile, dal Comune di Trieste, dopo gli atti burocratici
necessari, è stato sancito anche con una cerimonia in Municipio,
cui hanno partecipato il sindaco, Roberto Dipiazza, l'assessore
comunale ai Lavori pubblici Elisa Lodi, il direttore del
servizio immobiliare del Comune di Trieste Lucia Tomasi e per le
Generali il procuratore speciale Fabiana Zanchi. Riproduzione riservata © Copyright ANSA
en_title: Generali notes the historic Carciotti Palace of Trieste
en_content:
From today the historic building
Carciotti di Trieste is owned by Generali. The passage
of the property, from the Municipality of Trieste, after the bureaucratic acts
necessary, it was also sanctioned with a ceremony in City Hall,
attended by the mayor, Roberto Dipiazza, the Councillor
municipal to public works Elisa Lodi, the director of the
real estate service of the Municipality of Trieste Lucia Tomasi and for the
General the Special Attorney Fabiana Zanchi. Reproduction reserved © Copyright ANSA
en_subtitle: Today ceremony in City Hall. Cost 13.2 million euros

title: Completate palazzine del Villaggio Olimpico di Milano-Cortina
subtitle: Dopo i Giochi convertito in uno studentato con 1.700 posti letto
content:
Sono state completate a livello
edile e architettonico le sei palazzine che compongono la
struttura del Villaggio Olimpico, parte del più ampio progetto
di rigenerazione urbana dell'ex scalo ferroviario di Porta
Romana, a Milano. Il Villaggio Olimpico, che al termine dei
Giochi sarà convertito nel più grande studentato convenzionato
d'Italia con 1.700 posti letto, vede il coinvolgimento di
primari investitori istituzionali attraverso il fondo Coima
Olympic Village. Riproduzione riservata © Copyright ANSA
en_title: Complete buildings of the Olympic Village of Milan-Cortina
en_content:
They were completed at the level
building and architectural the six buildings that make up the
structure of the Olympic Village, part of the wider project
of urban regeneration of the former railway port
Romana, Milan. The Olympic Village, which at the end of the
Games will be converted into the largest partner student
in Italy with 1,700 beds, sees the involvement of
primary institutional investors through the Coima fund
Olympic Village. Reproduction reserved © Copyright ANSA
en_subtitle: After the Games converted into a student with 1,700 beds

title: Intesa fra ingegneri e Arma dei Carabinieri sulla formazione
subtitle: Per le iniziative infrastrutturali
content:
Il Consiglio nazionale degli
ingegneri, rappresentato dal presidente Angelo Domenico Perrini
e il Comando generale dell'Arma dei Carabinieri, rappresentato
dal Generale di Divisione Antonio Di Stasio, hanno firmato un
protocollo d'intesa "al fine di stabilire una collaborazione
strutturata e continuativa per promuovere la formazione, la
ricerca, e lo sviluppo tecnologico nel campo ingegneristico, con
riferimento alle iniziative infrastrutturali curate dalla
Direzione Lavori del Genio (DLG) dell'Arma dei Carabinieri". Riproduzione riservata © Copyright ANSA
en_title: Between engineers and Arma dei Carabinieri on training
en_content:
The National Council
engineers, represented by Angelo Domenico Perrini
and the General Command of the Carabinieri, represented
by Division General Antonio Di Stasio, they signed a
Agreement protocol "in order to establish a collaboration
structured and continuous to promote training,
research, and technological development in the engineering field, with
reference to infrastructure initiatives taken by
Genius (DLG) Department of Carabinieri. Reproduction reserved © Copyright ANSA
en_subtitle: For infrastructure initiatives

title: Castello Sgr lancia piattaforma investimenti in hotel di lusso
subtitle: Obiettivo investimenti per 500 milioni nei prossimi tre anni
content:
Castello Sgr lancia Hospitality
Italian Infrastructure Platform (Hiip), società di investimento
a capitale fisso (Sicaf) immobiliare di tipo chiuso con focus
sull'hospitality, di cui sarà general partner e gestore. Lo
riferisce la Sgr controllata da Anima in una nota, spiegando che
"l'obiettivo è creare per la prima volta in Italia, uno
strumento che investa in una decina di località ad alto
potenziale turistico nel nostro Paese". La piattaforma punta a
effettuare investimenti
complessivi per 500 milioni di euro nei prossimi 36 mesi. La
strategia del lancio preveda l'acquisizione di asset da
rilanciare attraverso altrettanti fondi dedicati dall'orizzonte
temporale di 4-5 anni. Le prime operazioni in via di
finalizzazione riguardano asset immobiliari situati in
destinazioni leisure di fascia alta nel Nord Italia, in una
primaria località sciistica dell'arco alpino e in Sardegna. Riproduzione riservata © Copyright ANSA
en_title: Castello Sgr launches investment platform in luxury hotel
en_content:
Castello Sgr lance Hospitality
Italian Infrastructure Platform (Hiip), investment company
fixed capital (Sicaf) closed type property with focus
the hospitality, of which will be general partner and manager. I do.
reports the Sgr controlled by Anima in a note, explaining that
"the goal is to create for the first time in Italy, one
tool investing in a dozen high places
tourism potential in our country". The platform points to
investment
total EUR 500 million over the next 36 months. The
Launch strategy previews acquisition of assets from
relaunch through as many funds dedicated from the horizon
4-5 year time. The first operations
finalization concern real estate assets located in
high-end leisure destinations in Northern Italy, in a
primary ski resort of the Alps and Sardinia. Reproduction reserved © Copyright ANSA
en_subtitle: Investment target for 500 million over the next three years
